---
name: Skill / improvement request
about: Propose a new skill or an improvement to an existing one
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

**The gap**
What phase or task isn't well covered today (spec / plan / build / verify /
review / ship), and for which part of the stack (Rust/Anchor/Solana, TS,
Astro/Next, Python)?

**Proposed skill or change**
What should the skill tell an agent to do? How does it defer to
`fullstack-standard` instead of restating it?

**When to use / when NOT to use**
The trigger conditions that would make an agent load it.

**Prior art**
Existing skills it overlaps with or should link to.
